name: Black Forest Cheesecake Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate chips.
2. Combine crumbs and melted margarine. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
4. In a large bowl, mix cream cheese and sugar until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in chocolate chips and almond extract.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 45 minutes.
7. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan. Cool before removing the rim of the pan.
8. Chill thoroughly.
9. Just before serving, top the cheesecake with cherry pie filling and whipped topping.
